import re, unicodedata

def strip_diacritics(s):
    # Remove Arabic diacritics (Tashkeel) and tatweel
    arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    s = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', s)
    s = s.replace('ـ', '')
    return s

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = str(s)
    # normalize punctuation
    s = s.replace('“','"').replace('”','"').replace('‘',"'").replace('’',"'").replace('،',',').replace('؛',';').replace('ـ','')
    # remove tashkeel
    s = strip_diacritics(s)
    # unify hamza forms, alef
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه').replace('ى','ي')
    # remove punctuation except basic
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip().lower()
    return s

def norm_tokens(s):
    return normalize_arabic(s).split()

def token_f1(pred, gold):
    tp = len(set(pred) & set(gold))
    prec = tp/len(set(pred)) if pred else 0
    rec = tp/len(set(gold)) if gold else 0
    if prec+rec==0: return 0.0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

def lcs(a,b):
    # normalized lcs length
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1,n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1,m+1):
            tmp = dp[j]
            if a[i-1]==b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev+1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = tmp
    return dp[m]

def sim_ratio(s1, s2):
    a = normalize_arabic(s1)
    b = normalize_arabic(s2)
    if not a or not b:
        return 0.0
    L = lcs(a, b)
    return L / max(len(a), len(b))

orig_full = "خيركم خيركم لأهله وأنا خيري لأهلي"
snippet = "خيركم خيرك...خيري لأهلي"
normalize_arabic(orig_full), normalize_arabic(snippet), sim_ratio(orig_full, snippet)

    if not text: 
        continue
    norm_text = normalize_arabic(text)
    if norm_phrase in norm_text:
        candidates.append((i, text))
len(candidates)

cand_texts = [t for _, t in candidates]
cand_texts
